lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਾ ਭਗਤਿ ਜਨੁ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: ehaa bhagat jan jeevat marai |
lines.english: True Devotion is to remain dead while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਤਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee bhavajal tarai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one crosses over the terrible world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਥਾਇ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai bachan bhagat thaae paae |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, one's devotion is accepted,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har jeeo aap vasai man aae |4|
lines.english: and then, the Dear Lord Himself comes to dwell in the mind. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲ ਭਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: nihachal bhagat har siau chit laae |
lines.english: Then, one's devotion becomes steady, and the consciousness is centered upon the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kripaa kare satiguroo milaae |
lines.english: When the Lord bestows His Mercy, He leads us to meet the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat rate tina sachee soe |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with Devotion have truthful reputations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥੧੨॥੫੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate sukh hoe |5|12|51|
lines.english: O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, the Name of the Lord, peace is obtained. ||5||12||51||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਘਰੁ ੮ ਕਾਫੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa ghar 8 kaafee mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Eighth House, Kaafee, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasai har boojhai soee |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Lord abides in the mind, and one comes to understand the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਝੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kai bhaanai satigur milai sach sojhee hoee |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of the Lord's Will, one meets the True Guru, and true understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਸਹੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mai sahu daataa ek hai avar naahee koee |
lines.english: My Husband Lord, the Great Giver, is One. There is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh nirbhau har naam hai paaeeai gur veechaar |
lines.english: In this age, the Lord's Name is fearless; it is obtained by meditative reflection upon the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਾ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te man vasai taa sadaa sukh hoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's merciful favor, He abides in the mind, and then, a lasting peace ensues. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਮ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧ ਗਵਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bin naavai jam kai vas hai manamukh andh gavaar |2|
lines.english: Without the Name, the blind, foolish, self-willed manmukh is under Death's power. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਭਾਣੈ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har kai bhaanai saalaaheeai bhaanai maniai sukh hoee |3|
lines.english: By the Pleasure of the Lord's Will, He is to be praised; surrendering to His Will, peace ensues. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜਨੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kai bhaanai jan sevaa karai boojhai sach soee |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of the Lord's Will, the humble being performs His service, and understands the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kai bhaanai janam padaarath paaeaa mat aootam hoee |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of the Lord's Will, the prize of this human birth is obtained, and the intellect is exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੪॥੩੯॥੧੩॥੫੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam salaeh toon guramukh gat hoee |4|39|13|52|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord; as Gurmukh, you shall be emancipated. ||4||39||13||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 4 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fourth Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਚਿਆਰੁ ਮੈਡਾ ਸਾਂਈ ॥
lines.translit: toon karataa sachiaar maiddaa saanee |
lines.english: You are the True Creator, my Lord Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਤੂੰ ਸਭਨੀ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh teree toon sabhanee dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: All are Yours; all meditate on You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਥੀਸੀ ਜੋ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਹਉ ਪਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo tau bhaavai soee theesee jo toon dehi soee hau paaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: That which is pleasing to Your Will, comes to pass. Whatever You give, that is what I receive. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਧਾ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh laadhaa manamukh gavaaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs obtain it, and the self-willed manmukhs lose it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਤਿਨਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kareh tin naam ratan paaeaa |
lines.english: He alone, whom You bless with Your Mercy, obtains the jewel of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਦਰੀਆਉ ਸਭ ਤੁਝ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: toon dareeaau sabh tujh hee maeh |
lines.english: You are the River - all are within You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪਿ ਵਿਛੋੜਿਆ ਆਪਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tudh aap vichhorriaa aap milaaeaa |1|
lines.english: You Yourself separate the mortals, and You Yourself unite them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋਈ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin doojaa koee naeh |
lines.english: Other than You, there is no one at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਜੋਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਮੇਲੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: vijog mil vichhurriaa sanjogee mel |2|
lines.english: The united ones are separated, and the separated ones are re-united. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਜਾਣਾਇਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no too jaanaaeihi soee jan jaanai |
lines.english: That humble being, whom You inspire to understand, understands;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਖੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh teraa khel |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are your play-things.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jin har seviaa tin sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: One who serves the Lord, obtains peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਆਖਿ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: har gun sad hee aakh vakhaanai |
lines.english: he continually speaks and chants the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tudh bin doojaa avar na koe |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sahaje hee har naam samaaeaa |3|
lines.english: He is easily absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: too aape karataa teraa keea sabh hoe |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Creator; by Your doing, all things come to be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੫੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak guramukh paragatt hoe |4|1|53|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, the Lord is revealed to the Gurmukh. ||4||1||53||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: too kar kar vekheh jaaneh soe |
lines.english: You watch over the creation, and understand it.
